message:
feat(distributed,stream,trace): implement trace monoid, expand distributed encoding/assignment edge cases, and harden stream combinators

Trace subsystem:
- Implement formal trace monoid M(Σ,I) with Foata normal form canonical
  representatives, monoid identity/concatenation, and O(1) fingerprint-based
  equivalence checks (canonicalize.rs)
- Add academic references (Cartier & Foata 1969, Mazurkiewicz 1977/1987,
  Diekert & Rozenberg 1995) and complexity documentation
- Fix trace module re-exports (distributed/mod.rs, mod.rs)

Distributed subsystem:
- Add extensive edge-case tests for SymbolAssigner: more-replicas-than-symbols,
  single-symbol, k > symbol_count, uneven striping, single-replica striping,
  zero-replicas, deterministic ordering, and k=0 corner case (assignment.rs)
- Add encoding pipeline edge-case tests: partial-symbol decode rejection,
  duplicate-symbol idempotency, zero-byte-object encoding, and codec
  round-trip property tests (distribution.rs, encoding.rs)

Stream/combinator subsystem:
- Add property-based and edge-case tests for select combinator: empty-branch
  polling, single-branch fast-path, waker forwarding, and deterministic
  tie-breaking (select.rs)
- Add chain stream tests: transition from first to second stream, empty
  first/second stream, and fused behavior (chain.rs)
- Expand filter stream tests with predicate edge cases (filter.rs)
- Expand merge stream coverage: priority ordering, empty-stream skip,
  single-stream passthrough, all-pending behavior, and incremental
  readiness (merge.rs)

Channel:
- Add broadcast channel tests: send returns live receiver count, recv
  waiter dedup with CountingWaker, and closed-channel detection (broadcast.rs)

Web:
- Add middleware layer tests for request/response interception (middleware.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
